export default function SearchBar({ value, onChange }) { return (
onChange(e.target.value)} placeholder="Search products..." className="w-full pl-10 pr-10 py-3 bg-white border border-gray-200 rounded-xl text-sm text-slate-800 placeholder-slate-400 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500 focus:border-transparent transition-all duration-200" /> {value && ( )}
); }
